description: DEFY restores beauty and youth with natural results through advanced plastic and reconstructive surgery in San Diego.
paragraphs: Time, stress, and gravity result in devastating changes to the body and mind. At DEFY, we restore, correct and maximize the beauty and youth that has faded. Our board certified Plastic & Reconstructive surgeon has extensive experience in the most advanced and successful techniques.

Our mantra is "natural results & maximum beauty". By providing true and complete correction, the longest lasting and most natural results are achieved. Our goal is to create the most amazing and perfect "you". We offer a multidisciplinary approach and customized strategy. Together we can achieve your aesthetic goals and maintain those results for years to come.
